datasets.name: user_behavioral_telemetry
datasets.source: Supabase/PostgreSQL event logging — session starts, workout completions, skips, interaction depth, drop-off timestamps

datasets.name: user_profiles_and_memory
datasets.source: Supabase — onboarding intake, goals, injury flags, fitness level, motivational profile, session history summaries
datasets.format: PostgreSQL relational schema + JSONB fields for flexible attributes

datasets.name: exercise_science_knowledge_base
datasets.source: NSCA guidelines, ACSM standards, PubMed exercise science abstracts, periodization frameworks, contraindication reference tables — curated and chunked
datasets.format: Chunked text embeddings stored in pgvector (Supabase extension)
datasets.cost: ~$15 one-time embedding cost via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small

datasets.name: behavioral_economics_playbook
datasets.source: Synthesized corpus from Fogg Behavior Model, BJ Fogg Tiny Habits, Nir Eyal Hooked, academic habit loop literature, ethical nudge design frameworks

datasets.name: onboarding_ux_benchmarks
datasets.source: Teardowns of Fitbod, Noom, Duolingo, Headspace onboarding flows — UX audit notes, heuristic analysis, first-session flow maps, App Store review mining for friction patterns
datasets.format: Structured markdown documents + embeddings in pgvector

datasets.name: churn_signal_model
datasets.source: Derived from user_behavioral_telemetry — engineered features: days_since_last_session, workouts_completed_d1_d7, avg_session_duration_trend, skip_rate, notification_response_rate
datasets.format: PostgreSQL materialized views + lightweight Python scoring model (scikit-learn or heuristic rules at MVP)

datasets.name: workout_generation_templates
datasets.source: Coach-authored structured workout templates: exercise library with muscle groups, equipment requirements, difficulty tiers, progressive overload parameters, contraindication tags
datasets.format: PostgreSQL tables — normalized exercise library with JSONB program templates

datasets.name: llm_prompt_cache_and_routing_config
datasets.source: Internal — versioned prompt templates, model routing rules (GPT-4o-mini vs Claude Sonnet tiering logic), cached system prompt hashes, token budget configs per agent
datasets.format: YAML config files + Redis or Supabase KV for runtime cache
datasets.cost: free — Redis via Upstash free tier (~$0/month at MVP scale)

datasets.name: user_research_interviews
datasets.source: Founder-conducted user interviews, App Store review scrapes (TransformFit + competitors), synthesized personas, Jobs-to-be-Done frameworks, dropout moment qualitative data
datasets.format: Chunked interview transcripts + review summaries as embeddings in pgvector
datasets.cost: free — founder research + App Store scraping

datasets.name: legal_compliance_templates
datasets.source: GDPR Article 9 health data guidance, CCPA health data provisions, FTC health app guidance, Iubenda or Termly generated policy templates, health disclaimer frameworks
datasets.format: Markdown/HTML policy documents + structured consent flow specifications
datasets.cost: ~$29/month Iubenda Starter or one-time $50 Termly export — or free via open-source templates with founder review

datasets.name: retention_benchmark_data
datasets.source: Industry retention benchmarks — Lenny's Newsletter cohort data, Andreessen Horowitz consumer app retention studies, fitness app category benchmarks from Sensor Tower / data.ai reports, academic mobile health app retention meta-analyses
datasets.format: Curated research summaries as embeddings in pgvector
datasets.cost: free — publicly available reports and synthesized summaries

datasets.name: sleep_and_recovery_reference
datasets.source: Sleep science corpus — Matthew Walker Why We Sleep summaries, NSCA recovery guidelines, HRV-based readiness research abstracts, overtraining syndrome indicators

external_apis.name: OpenAI API (GPT-4o-mini + text-embedding-3-small)
external_apis.purpose: Primary LLM inference for all agents with tiered routing — GPT-4o-mini for high-volume coaching responses, GPT-4o for complex personalization reasoning, text-embedding-3-small for all RAG vector builds
external_apis.cost: ~$80–$120/month at MVP scale within $200 cap — managed via Nova's prompt caching and token budget configs

external_apis.name: Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector + Auth + Realtime)
external_apis.purpose: Primary data infrastructure — structured user data, behavioral telemetry, vector embeddings for RAG, authentication, real-time session event streaming
external_apis.cost: Free tier up to 500MB DB / 50K MAU — Pro plan $25/month if scale requires

external_apis.name: Upstash Redis
external_apis.purpose: LLM prompt caching layer, session context cache, rate limiting for AI inference calls — reduces redundant LLM calls by caching identical or near-identical prompt hashes
external_apis.cost: Free tier (10K commands/day) — Pay-as-you-go ~$0.20 per 100K commands beyond free tier

external_apis.name: Sentry
external_apis.purpose: Error tracking and performance monitoring for FastAPI backend — surfaces AI pipeline failures, onboarding flow errors, and workout generation exceptions without requiring dedicated DevOps monitoring
external_apis.cost: Free tier (5K errors/month) — sufficient for MVP stage

external_apis.name: PostHog
external_apis.purpose: Product analytics and behavioral event tracking — funnel analysis for onboarding drop-off, session replay for UX friction identification, feature flag management for A/B testing retention interventions
external_apis.cost: Free tier (1M events/month) — covers MVP scale entirely

total_estimated_cost: ~$20 one-time embedding build cost + $25–$55/month recurring infrastructure (Supabase Pro if needed, Iubenda) — AI inference budget managed separately within Michael's $200/month cap
